name: Oudolf Classic
description: Hand-drawn line glyphs in the tradition of Piet Oudolf's planting plans: radial composites, hatched grasses, tufted sedges, umbel clusters. Glyphs use currentColor so the active palette flows through.

Asteraceae.svg: <g stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" fill="none"><line x1="12" y1="3" x2="12" y2="21"/><line x1="3" y1="12" x2="21" y2="12"/><line x1="5.6" y1="5.6" x2="18.4" y2="18.4"/><line x1="18.4" y1="5.6" x2="5.6" y2="18.4"/></g><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="2.5" fill="currentColor"/>

Poaceae.svg: <g stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.6" stroke-linecap="round" fill="none"><line x1="7" y1="21" x2="6" y2="4"/><line x1="12" y1="21" x2="12" y2="3"/><line x1="17" y1="21" x2="18" y2="4"/></g>

Cyperaceae.svg: <g fill="currentColor"><circle cx="8" cy="15" r="1.6"/><circle cx="16" cy="15" r="1.6"/><circle cx="12" cy="8" r="1.6"/></g><g stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.2" stroke-linecap="round"><line x1="8" y1="15" x2="8" y2="19"/><line x1="16" y1="15" x2="16" y2="19"/><line x1="12" y1="8" x2="12" y2="5"/></g>

Lamiaceae.svg: <g stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" fill="none"><polyline points="5,16 12,7 19,16"/><polyline points="7,19 12,12 17,19"/></g>

Iridaceae.svg: <g stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.6" stroke-linecap="round" fill="none"><path d="M12 21 C 11 12, 8 7, 6 4"/><path d="M12 21 C 12 12, 12 6, 12 3"/><path d="M12 21 C 13 12, 16 7, 18 4"/></g>

Liliaceae.svg: <g stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.6" stroke-linecap="round" fill="none"><path d="M12 21 C 11 12, 8 7, 6 4"/><path d="M12 21 C 12 12, 12 6, 12 3"/><path d="M12 21 C 13 12, 16 7, 18 4"/></g>

Fagaceae.svg: <circle cx="12" cy="12" r="9" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" fill="none"/><g stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="0.9" fill="none"><line x1="5" y1="7" x2="19" y2="17"/><line x1="5" y1="17" x2="19" y2="7"/><line x1="12" y1="3" x2="12" y2="21"/><line x1="3" y1="12" x2="21" y2="12"/></g>

Rosaceae.svg: <circle cx="12" cy="12" r="7" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" fill="none"/><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="2.2" fill="currentColor"/>

5.svg: <circle cx="12" cy="12" r="9" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" fill="none"/><g stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="0.9" fill="none"><line x1="5" y1="7" x2="19" y2="17"/><line x1="5" y1="17" x2="19" y2="7"/></g>

4.svg: <circle cx="12" cy="12" r="7" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" fill="none"/><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="2" fill="currentColor"/>

3.svg: <circle cx="12" cy="12" r="5" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.4" fill="none"/>

name: Bold Geometric
description: Filled geometric shapes — stars for composites, triangles for grasses, hexagons for umbels. Reads at a glance for presentations.

Fagaceae.svg: <circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10" fill="currentColor"/><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="4" fill="#fff"/>

5.svg: <circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10" fill="currentColor"/><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="4" fill="#fff"/>
